title: Toothbrush Holder Anti-slip Electric Toothbrush Holder For Bathroom Countertop, 4 Compartments Detachable Toothbrush Caddy With Drainage For Family
features: High Quality Bathroom Countertop Organiser: The electric toothbrush holder made of food grade plastic material, which is also sturdy and durable. Will not rust and it has long service life.

Perfect Size & Capacity: 5.1in * 3.7in * 4.5in. It's a compact size that doesn't take up much space. And the toothbrush holder with 4 compartments ensures that all items are in order and convenient storage, helping you place everything in place while maximizing space utilization.

Practical Design: The bathroom toothbrush holder is designed with ventilation holes on both sides to keep it dry and air circulating. There are also non-slip rubber feet on the bottom of the toothbrush holder to keep it stable on any flat surface.

Detachable & Easy To Clean: The toothbrush holder for bathroom is detachable both upwards and downwards, making it convenient for cleaning. And there are also 4 drain holes at the bottom of the toothbrush holder caddy, so you don't have to worry about water accumulation in the toothbrush holder.

Stylish Organization: The electric toothbrush holders for bathroom has a sleek and modern design that complements any bathroom decor while accommodating many items, such as toothbrushes, electric heads, toothpaste, comb, razor, ensuring each family member has their own dedicated space.
description: Product Description The Bathroom Electric Toothbrush Holder has a sleek and modern design that complements any bathroom decor Detachable The detachable design makes cleaning easier. Anti-slip The non-slip bottom design prevents the toothbrush holder from falling or scratching the desktop. Ventilation Holes The ventilation holes are designed to allow better air circulation without creating odors. Quick Dry The drainage hole design on the bottom makes drainage more convenient.
